text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you, Urara! Just how long do you intend
to sleep for? Put on your uniform at once!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sleeping... See, I'm riding in the carrot. My
seat belt is on and everything...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: King, you're in the back seat... Away we go, to Carrot Park... Mumble...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just whatever are you dreaming about?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just look at the state of you—drool dribbling
down your chin... Hurry up and wipe it off! Must
every morning be like this?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Leave me aloooone! I'm going to the academy in
my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well then, go on. Put on your racewear.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Why not? But what bad timin', ya know? Just
when I got all these nice chewy mochi dumplings
for whoever wears their uniform properly.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I changed my mind! I'll wear my uniform. Gimme
the mochi with the sticky sweet soy sauce!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. Every mornin' is an uphill battle with
her. And this is just the start...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's a little birdie! Where's it going?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm all antsy now! I gotta go run!
